locationAddress: Hopefully somewhere nice!
overview: We are not having an event in August as we know many people will be on holiday - we hope you have a great break and we'll see you at the next one in September!

locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB

title: {dev.talk} - The One with the Cybersecurity hack
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview:
This is a collab with the B2600 Cybersecurity community.
Attendees will participate in a no pressure, hands-on cybersecurity AI vibe coding challenge. No experience of cybersecurity or software development is required.

title: {dev.talk} - The One without a speaker
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: We are looking for a speaker for this event - if you have a topic you'd like to share, please get in touch!

title: {dev.talk} - The One with Geospatial Clues and Post-Incident Truths
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: Attendees will explore practical geospatial concepts and tools, then see a real incident case study showing how teams can prepare, respond, and improve after major production issues.

title: {dev.talk} - The One Where JARVIS Fits in Your Pocket and the IC Grows Up
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: This event covers building a privacy-first agentic mobile OS and shares practical lessons on how management experience can help you grow as an engineer.

title: {dev.talk} - The One With The Gaming Collab
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: This event is packed with practical game development advice, from the key decisions that help you finish game jams faster to smart ways to build an audience and work with marketing while you ship.

title: {dev.talk} - The One Where We Don't Break the Platform (or Believe the Hype)
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: In this event, attendees will hear how to cut through AI hype with a practical automation framework, plus how to make websites easier to evolve using feature isolation without a full rebuild.

title: {dev.talk} - The one with something different
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: A fun and social end-of-year session where everyone can take part in a general knowledge quiz and celebrate together.

title: {dev.talk} - The one with our Birthday
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: This event blends humour and hard lessons, exploring the human side of software engineering through a sitcom lens and reflecting on bugs from the Post Office Horizon system and what teams can learn from them.

title: {dev.talk} - The One Where PMs Ask, Designers Imagine, and Devs Improvise
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: Attendees will hear short, practical talks on improving developer environments with Nix, using domain-specific languages to simplify complex problems, and building better collaboration between product managers and developers.

title: {dev.talk} - The one where we learn to Level Up Our DevEx
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: A deep dive into developer experience, covering how to test complex end-to-end flows effectively and how .NET Aspire and OpenTelemetry can make integration testing and local development smoother.

title: {dev.talk} - The one with the conference come down
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: This event focuses on managing change and growth, with insights on helping people adopt new tools and a real-world case study on evolving service boundaries and architecture over time.

title: {dev.talk} - The one where we connect before re:connect
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: A collaborative and relaxed community night featuring a fun general knowledge quiz with the Re:connect conference.

title: {dev.talk} - The one where Open Source AI tries to break into Tech
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: Attendees will explore the current open-source AI landscape and hear real stories and advice on pathways into the tech industry.

title: {dev.talk} - The one where we will see you at BU
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: This event highlights practical engineering approaches, from applying Clean Architecture in Salesforce to using OpenTelemetry to make application observability easier.

title: {dev.talk} - The one with Creatives & Coders at Cottonwood
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: A varied event covering modern PHP, the real ups and downs of building a YouTube channel, and practical strategies for landing a tech role without a computer science degree.

title: {dev.talk} - The one where we forged friendships at the FOUNDRY
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: In this event, attendees will hear how agentic AI is shaping the future of automation and get practical guidance on navigating today’s changing tech hiring market.

title: {dev.talk} - The one where we deployed our first PATCH
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: This event shares lessons from building a city-based maze game with open tools, alongside a candid look at scaling teams and systems through a domain-driven design transformation.

title: {dev.talk} - the one where we got started
locationAddress: Talbot Campus, Fern Barrow, Poole, Dorset, BH12 5BB
overview: A strong kickoff event featuring a student perspective on breaking into tech, practical microservice design with REPR, and lessons learned from building a vertiport automation platform.
